languages.text: "Погоди, Паскаль ведь тоже нес службу на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17! Вы не были знакомы?"
languages.translation_comment:
1. Паскаль в пати
2. если в диалоге паскаля он рассказал, что на алтарь-темплуме служил

1. Паскаль в пати
2. если в диалоге паскаля он рассказал, что на алтарь-темплуме служил

languages.text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"
languages.original_text: "Погоди, Паскаль ведь тоже нес службу на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17! Вы не были знакомы?"

traits.locale_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"
"Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

languages.text: «Espere, ¡Pasqal también servía en Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 por aquel entonces! ¿No se conocían?».
languages.original_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

traits.locale_text: «Espere, ¡Pasqal también servía en Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 por aquel entonces! ¿No se conocían?».

languages.text: “等等，当年帕斯卡也在卡利西斯祭坛17号上服役，你们俩不认识？”
languages.original_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

traits.locale_text: “等等，当年帕斯卡也在卡利西斯祭坛17号上服役，你们俩不认识？”

languages.text: « Une petite seconde, Pasqal aussi se trouvait sur Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 à l'époque ! Vous ne l'avez pas connu ? »
languages.original_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

traits.locale_text: « Une petite seconde, Pasqal aussi se trouvait sur Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 à l'époque ! Vous ne l'avez pas connu ? »

languages.text: "Wartet, Pasqal hat damals auch auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 gedient! Ihr wart nicht miteinander bekannt?"
languages.original_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

traits.locale_text: "Wartet, Pasqal hat damals auch auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 gedient! Ihr wart nicht miteinander bekannt?"

languages.text: "待てよ、パスカルは当時、オルター＝テンプラム＝カリクシス＝エクスト17にも勤務していた！二人は面識がなかったのか？"
languages.original_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

languages.text: "Dur... Pasqal da o zamanlar Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'de görevliydi! Hiç karşılaşmadınız mı?"
languages.original_text: "Wait, Pasqal was also serving on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 back then! You two weren't acquainted?"

traits.locale_text: "Dur... Pasqal da o zamanlar Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'de görevliydi! Hiç karşılaşmadınız mı?"
